00021 package jelatine.cldc.io;
00022 
00023 import java.io.IOException;
00024 
00025 import javax.microedition.io.Connection;
00026 
00029 public interface Protocol {
00030 
00037     public Connection open(URL url, int mode, boolean timeouts)
00038                       throws IllegalArgumentException, IOException;
00039 
00040 }
